name: Humboldt Country Club
about: Humboldt Country Club is a 9-hole golf course located on Highway 3 just west of Humboldt, Iowa. The club is open to the public and offers a welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels. Its features include well-groomed fairways, bunkers, and greens that create a challenging yet friendly playing experience, complemented by scenic views of the West Fork of the Des Moines River. Beyond the course, the facility provides amenities such as two outdoor patios with scenic views, indoor dining, a full bar, an indoor golf simulator, and party room rental options. The club maintains a relaxed pace of play, allowing players to enjoy the peaceful surroundings and focus on their game. Membership and rental information, along with rates for green fees and cart rentals, are available on the club's website.
why_golfers_like_it: Relaxed pace of play with scenic river views
Indoor golf simulator rental available for all golfers
Welcoming environment suitable for all skill levels
Availability of clubhouse rental for private events
Outdoor patios offering scenic views of the course

food_and_drink.notes: Indoor dining available at the clubhouse
Full bar available at the clubhouse

faq.answer: The club offers indoor dining and a full bar, but its policy on outside food and drinks is not specified in the provided information.

faq.answer: The club emphasizes a relaxed pace of play, but a specific time for 18 holes is not mentioned in the provided information.
